steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Solve the system by substituting the linear equation into the quadratic. From $y - x = 32$, we get $y = x + 32$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
Substitute into $y = x^2 - 30x$:$$x + 32 = x^2 - 30x$$$$0 = x^2 - 31x - 32$$$$0 = (x - 32)(x + 1)$$So $x = 32$ or $x = -1$. Back-substituting with $y = x + 32$:
When $x = 32$: $y = 64$.
When $x = -1$: $y = 31$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The possible values of $y$ are 31 and 64. Only 64 appears among the choices, so D (64) is correct.
